title: More Nonsense Limerick 2
content:
There was an Old Man at a Junction,
    Whose feelings were wrung with compunction
    When they said, "The Train's gone!" 
    He exclaimed, "How forlorn!"
    But remained on the rails of the Junction.
meaning:
"More Nonsense Limerick 2" is a quintessential example of Edward Lear's signature style...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
